Faria Usman posted: Hackathon 2 Phase IV: Cloud-Native Todo Chatbot🚀



Excited to share my progress on Phase IV of the Cloud-Native Todo Chatbot project 🎯



In this phase, I focused on containerizing the Todo Chatbot and preparing it for cloud-native, Kubernetes-driven deployment, following a modern spec-driven, AI-assisted DevOps workflow.



🔧 What I implemented in this phase:



🐳 Containerized frontend & backend using Docker Desktop

Built and ran Docker images locally

Verified that containers start and work correctly on my system



📦 Prepared the foundation for Helm chart–based deployments

Created todo-chatbot-chart folder

Added initial structure, templates, and values.yaml placeholders



🧠 Followed Spec-Driven / Agentic Dev Stack workflow:

Wrote detailed specs

Generated deployment plans

Broke down tasks for AI-assisted implementation

Ensured every step is documented for reproducibility



💻 Documentation & Guides

Deployment guide, scaling and troubleshooting instructions ready

Performance benchmarks and security optimization notes included



💡 Working on this phase has been an incredible learning experience — exploring spec-driven development, containerization, and the foundations of Helm-based deployments has expanded my understanding of cloud-native application workflows.



Onward to smarter automation, Kubernetes orchestration, and Helm-driven releases! 🚀



Ameen Alam | Aneeq Khatri | Ali Aftab Sheikh | Hamza Ahmed Sheikh 

#Docker #Kubernetes #CloudNative #Helm #DevOps #Phase4 #TodoApp #AgenticWorkflow #SpecDrivenDevelopment #LearningInPublic #ClaudeCode #Microservices #Containerization #SoftwareEngineering #AIinDevOps #ProjectUpdate #TechJourney #SoftwareDevelopment #OpenSource #CloudNativeApps
